author.summary: A famous British author known for writing imaginative masterpieces like "Matilda" and "Charlie and the Chocolate Factory".
An iconic American writer and illustrator celebrated for his rhythmic, rhyming books like "The Cat in the Hat".
A legendary English author known for her charming animal tales, most notably "The Tale of Peter Rabbit".
A beloved designer and writer famous for his collage art style in books like "The Very Hungry Caterpillar".
One of the most prolific children's writers in history, famous for "The Famous Five" and "Noddy" series.
